comment: Policy for the current AF claim-set document (AF-2026-07-22-v6). §3 claims are the fragment corpus (class 'claims', parsed by lib.claims). The §3 Example 2 priority-gate blockquote is guidance: designated quotable here, excluded from the unit census by the claims parser, and rendered as a visibly labeled guidance note (TDD §2, §5.1). Quotable guidance blocks serve as caution/gate sources.
